name: Fused LeakyReLU² + Online GPTQ + Parallel Muon
blurb: 11L/512d with fused Triton LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP kernel (70ms/step → 33% more training steps), online Hessian GPTQ during training, Parallel Muon with parameter banking, XSA on all layers, INT6+LZMA with selective ±1 pruning. No TTT.
author: Vilhelm Toivonen
